title: decode-x-content per-item decode
description: One decoded piece of X content. Use as the StructuredOutput schema for batch/Workflow runs so N decodes aggregate cleanly.

archetype.description: named archetype from the taxonomy (extensible — coin a new one if the data demands it)

bm_per_1k_views.description: bookmarks per 1000 views — reach-normalized save rate

levels.description: decode as deep as the input allows; stamp 'n/a (no audio/video)' for layers you cannot reach — never fabricate

post_text.description: L1 — what the tweet text does

transcript.description: L2 — spoken content from Whisper, or 'n/a (no audio)'

visual.description: L4 — what the keyframe contact sheet shows, or 'n/a (no video)'

why.description: L5 — why it earns saves/reach for the metric that matters

timing.description: L6 — posting timing vs launches/news, web-verified with source

do.description: replicable do's grounded in this decode
